scripts.test:acceptance: pnpm test:acceptance:api && pnpm test:acceptance:web && pnpm test:acceptance:desktop
scripts.test:full: node platform/scripts/dev/test-full-preflight.mjs && pnpm check && pnpm test:integration && pnpm test:acceptance:web
scripts.check:product: pnpm --filter @compass/database run migrate:check && pnpm format:check && pnpm turbo run lint --filter=@compass/api --filter=@compass/web --filter=@compass/desktop --filter=@compass/app-shell --filter=@compass/ui --filter=@compass/contracts --filter=@compass/sdk --filter=@compass/database -- --max-warnings=0 && pnpm turbo run typecheck --filter=@compass/api --filter=@compass/web --filter=@compass/desktop --filter=@compass/app-shell --filter=@compass/ui --filter=@compass/contracts --filter=@compass/sdk --filter=@compass/database && pnpm turbo run test --filter=@compass/api --filter=@compass/web --filter=@compass/desktop --filter=@compass/app-shell --filter=@compass/ui --filter=@compass/contracts --filter=@compass/sdk --filter=@compass/database --ui=stream --log-order=grouped -- --silent=passed-only --reporter=dot && node platform/scripts/dev/assert-generated-artifacts-stable.mjs && node platform/scripts/dev/audit-legacy-references.mjs
scripts.check:commit: pnpm --filter @compass/database run migrate:check && pnpm format:check && pnpm turbo run lint --filter=@compass/api --filter=@compass/web --filter=@compass/contracts --filter=@compass/sdk --filter=@compass/database -- --max-warnings=0 && pnpm turbo run typecheck --filter=@compass/api --filter=@compass/web --filter=@compass/contracts --filter=@compass/sdk --filter=@compass/database && pnpm turbo run test --filter=@compass/api --filter=@compass/web --filter=@compass/contracts --filter=@compass/sdk --filter=@compass/database --ui=stream --log-order=grouped -- --silent=passed-only --reporter=dot && pnpm --filter @compass/web build && node platform/scripts/dev/assert-generated-artifacts-stable.mjs
